ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_categories" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note the reminder is for */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder is set for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., pending, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reminder the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_reminder_id FOREIGN KEY ("reminder_id") REFERENCES reminders ("reminder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_shares" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note being shared */,
  "shared_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the note is being shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the note was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the note share (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id", "shared_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES note_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note the attachment is for */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file in bytes */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was added */,
  "attachment_time" TEXT /* Time the attachment was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note the tag is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note the history entry is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_user_type" TEXT /* Type of user who made the change (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_note_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was made */,
  "search_time" TEXT /* Time the search was made */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
